creator: pjfloyd@wanadoo.fr
text:
Yesterday I got a couple of package build failure notifications.

Unfortunately the package build failure mail does not include the git branch being used (which I'd say is the single most important piece of information). The log does say
Ports top last git commit: 3368aa656


It looks like it is using origin/2024Q2 which is outdated.

The versions in origin/2024Q3 and origin/main are correct.
